description: Configuration for authentication mechanisms and policies used in the Authentication policy engine. Authentication policies can be used in risk-based access or context-based access policies to conditionally enforce additional authentication/authorization requirements. Authentication policies can also be attached to WebSEAL objects in the policy server.

mechanisms.description: List of authentication mechanism to create or update.

policies.description: List of authentication policies to create or update.

name.description: A unique name for the authentication mechanism.

description.description: An optional description of the authentication mechanism.

uri.description: The unique resource identifier of the authentication mechanism.

properties.description: List of properties to configure for mechanism. The property names are different for each of the mechanism types.

attributes.description: List of attribute to add from the request context.

Attribute.description: An attribute to retrieve from the authentication context.

selector.description: Name of a registry attribute to obtain.

Policy.description: An authentication policy that defines the authentication flow.

name.description: Specify a unique name for the authentication policy.

uri.description: Specify a unique resource identifier for the authentication policy.

dialect.description: Authentication policy specification used to format the authentication policy.

policy.description: Configured policy content that uses the specified authentication policy dialect (XML format).

enabled.description: True if the policy is enabled and invocable at runtime. Set to false to disable the policy.

mechanisms.name: Verify Demo - QR Code Initiate
mechanisms.description: InfoMap to initiate the QR login

mechanisms.name: Verify Demo - QR Code Response
mechanisms.description: InfoMap to use the LSI for QR login

mechanisms.name: reCAPTCHA Verification
mechanisms.description: Human user verification using reCAPTCHA Version 2.0.

mechanisms.name: FIDO Universal 2nd Factor
mechanisms.description: FIDO Universal 2nd Factor Token Registration and Authentication

policies.name: Verify Demo - Initiate Generic Message Demo Policy
policies.policy: <Policy xmlns="urn:ibm:security:authentication:policy:1.0:schema" PolicyId="urn:ibm:security:authentication:asf:verify_generic_message"><Description>IBM MFA generic message policy.</Description><Step id="id15342210896710" type="Authenticator"><Authenticator id="id15342210896711" AuthenticatorId="urn:ibm:security:authentication:asf:mechanism:generic_message"/></Step><Step id="id15342211135160" type="Authenticator"><Authenticator id="id15342211135161" AuthenticatorId="urn:ibm:security:authentication:asf:mechanism:mmfa"><Parameters><AttributeAssignment AttributeId="contextMessage"><AttributeDesignator AttributeId="message" Namespace="urn:ibm:security:asf:response:token:attributes" Source="urn:ibm:security:asf:scope:session" DataType="String"/></AttributeAssignment><AttributeAssignment AttributeId="mode"><AttributeValue DataType="String">Initiate</AttributeValue></AttributeAssignment><AttributeAssignment AttributeId="policyURI"><AttributeValue DataType="URI">urn:ibm:security:authentication:asf:verify_mmfa_response_fingerprint</AttributeValue></AttributeAssignment><AttributeAssignment AttributeId="username"><AttributeDesignator AttributeId="username" Namespace="urn:ibm:security:asf:response:token:attributes" Source="urn:ibm:security:asf:scope:session" DataType="String"/></AttributeAssignment></Parameters></Authenticator></Step></Policy>
